originalTitle: Why the Market Dipped But Samsara Inc. (IOT) Gained Today
summary: Samsara Inc. (IOT) closed at $38.32 in the latest trading session, marking a +2.3% move from the prior day.
content:
In the latest close session, Samsara Inc. (IOT) was up +2.3% at $38.32. The stock exceeded the S&P 500, which registered a loss of 1.01% for the day. On the other hand, the Dow registered a loss of 0.77%, and the technology-centric Nasdaq decreased by 1.4%.

Shares of the company have appreciated by 18.21% over the course of the past month, outperforming the Computer and Technology sector's loss of 3.73%, and the S&P 500's gain of 0.32%.

The investment community will be closely monitoring the performance of Samsara Inc. in its forthcoming earnings report. The company's earnings per share (EPS) are projected to be $0.17, reflecting a 41.67% increase from the same quarter last year. In the meantime, our current consensus estimate forecasts the revenue to be $482.47 million, indicating a 23.24% growth compared to the corresponding quarter of the prior year.

For the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates are projecting earnings of $0.75 per share and revenue of $2 billion, which would represent changes of +33.93% and +23.81%, respectively, from the prior year.

Additionally, investors should keep an eye on any recent revisions to analyst forecasts for Samsara Inc. Such recent modifications usually signify the changing landscape of near-term business trends. As a result, we can interpret positive estimate revisions as a good sign for the business outlook.

Our research shows that these estimate changes are directly correlated with near-term stock prices. To benefit from this, we have developed the Zacks Rank, a proprietary model which takes these estimate changes into account and provides an actionable rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, stretching from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has a noteworthy track record of outperforming, validated by third-party audits, with stocks rated #1 producing an average annual return of +25% since the year 1988. Over the last 30 days, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has witnessed an unchanged state. Samsara Inc. is holding a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy) right now.

From a valuation perspective, Samsara Inc. is currently exchanging hands at a Forward P/E ratio of 49.95. This denotes a premium relative to the industry average Forward P/E of 20.37.

We can also see that IOT currently has a PEG ratio of 1.73. Comparable to the widely accepted P/E ratio, the PEG ratio also accounts for the company's projected earnings growth. IOT's industry had an average PEG ratio of 1.11 as of yesterday's close.

The Internet - Software industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. With its current Zacks Industry Rank of 86, this industry ranks in the top 35% of all industries, numbering over 250.

The Zacks Industry Rank assesses the vigor of our specific industry groups by computing the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks incorporated in the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Don't forget to use Zacks.com to keep track of all these stock-moving metrics, and others, in the upcoming trading sessions.

chineseTitle: 为什么市场下跌但 Samsara Inc. (IOT) 今天上涨
chineseSummary: Samsara Inc. (IOT) 在最近一个交易日收于 38.32 美元，较前一日上涨 2.3%。
chineseContent:
在最近的收盘交易中，Samsara Inc. (IOT) 上涨 2.3%，至 38.32 美元。该股超过标准普尔 500 指数，后者当日下跌 1.01%。另一方面，道琼斯指数下跌0.77%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数下跌1.4%。

过去一个月，该公司股价上涨了 18.21%，跑赢了计算机和技术板块 3.73% 的跌幅以及标准普尔 500 指数 0.32% 的涨幅。

投资界将密切关注 Samsara Inc. 即将发布的收益报告的表现。该公司每股收益（EPS）预计为0.17美元，较去年同期增长41.67%。与此同时，我们目前的共识预测收入为 4.8247 亿美元，比去年同期增长 23.24%。

对于全年，Zacks 一致预期预计每股收益为 0.75 美元，收入为 20 亿美元，与上一年相比分别变化 +33.93% 和 +23.81%。

此外，投资者应密切关注分析师对 Samsara Inc. 预测的近期修正。此类近期修正通常意味着近期业务趋势的变化。因此，我们可以将积极的估计修正解读为业务前景的好兆头。

我们的研究表明，这些估计变化与近期股价直接相关。为了从中受益，我们开发了 Zacks Rank，这是一种专有模型，它考虑了这些估计变化并提供了可行的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统从#1（强力买入）延伸到#5（强力卖出），拥有出色的表现记录，经第三方审计验证，自 1988 年以来，排名第一的股票产生的平均年回报率为 +25%。在过去 30 天内，Zacks 共识每股收益估计保持不变。 Samsara Inc . 目前的 Zacks 排名为第二（购买）。

从估值角度来看，Samsara Inc.目前的远期市盈率为49.95。这表明相对于行业平均远期市盈率 20.37 存在溢价。

我们还可以看到IOT目前的PEG比率为1.73。与广泛接受的市盈率相比，PEG 比率也反映了公司的预期盈利增长。截至昨日收盘，物联网行业平均PEG率为1.11。

互联网 - 软件行业是计算机和技术行业的一部分。目前该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 86 位，在所有行业中排名前 35%，数量超过 250 个。

Zacks 行业排名通过计算特定行业组中个股的平均 Zacks 排名来评估我们特定行业组的活力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

不要忘记使用 Zacks.com 在即将到来的交易时段中跟踪所有这些股票变动指标以及其他指标。
